title: Falcon Standards History
description: Typed audit log of rule firings + promotion lifecycle: .claude/standards-history.yaml. Replaces legacy free-form standards-history.md (per DAR 9). Rules keyed by stable slug; section_ref is presentational and can change. Companion doc: .claude/docs/standards-history-schema.md.

rules.description: Per-rule metadata, keyed by stable slug (kebab-case, auto-generated from title at promotion, manually overridable). Slug never changes; section_ref can.

firings.description: Time-ordered firings (newest-first). Each firing references a rule slug.

section_ref.description: Current label in rules/development-standards.md (presentational; may change on renumber).

promoted_from_firings.description: Optional but recommended provenance: enhancements.yaml entry IDs that drove the 3+ firings threshold.

deprecation_status.description: null = active. Otherwise: 'deprecated YYYY-MM-DD: <reason>' OR 'split into <slug-a>, <slug-b> (YYYY-MM-DD)' OR 'merged into <slug> (YYYY-MM-DD)'.

rule_id.description: MUST reference a key in rules{} above.

section_ref_at_firing.description: Optional audit trail across renumbers: what the rule was called at firing time.

fired_correctly.description: false signals deviation/misapplication — useful signal for rule misunderstanding.

dispatch_id.description: Falcon dispatch ID for synthesis-mode firings. Null for direct-work.

commit_sha.description: Optional commit where the firing manifested.

context.description: Multi-line block scalar narrative — preserve fidelity from prior markdown form.
